label: Fixed
items: Harvest window highlight now appears reliably in every month, not just the months where the calendar's main task fetch happened to include the windowed task. The green tint is now driven by a dedicated query that pulls every active harvest window in the home, regardless of which month you're viewing.

Internal: previously the highlight piggy-backed on the calendar's 3-month view-range fetch, so a window task whose due_date sat outside that range could silently drop out of the tint set even though its window covered the visible days.
